## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal behavior or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Notes

- office UI / scene
- install / marketplace
- platform API
- documentation / DX

Screenshots, references, or related issues.
